name: Maple Syrup Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the cold water and flour until smooth.
2. Stir the mixture into a small heavy saucepan containing the maple syrup.
3. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened, about 7 minutes.
4. Stir in the beaten egg.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the melted butter.
6. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
7. Let cool.
